legacy.content:
# Phase 38-01 Summary: Release hardening (pack-driven spaces)
## Completed
1. Runtime naming compatibility added: `contentFeatures`/`powerFeatures` with legacy `thematicBasisTraits` support. 2. KAPLAY supports `contentFeaturesUrl` runtime override plus legacy query alias. 3. Required validation commands are green across docs-site, engine, and engine-mcp.
## Open
1. Add explicit CI check entry for `contentFeaturesUrl` runtime override smoke. 2. Add explorer smoke script in docs pipeline for multi-space render checks.
## Verification
- `pnpm --dir packages/engine run typecheck` passed. - `pnpm --dir packages/engine run build` passed. - `pnpm --dir packages/engine run test:replay-smoke` passed. - `pnpm --dir packages/engine run test:long-run-suite` passed. - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run typecheck` passed. - `pnpm --dir packages/engine-mcp run test:parity-smoke` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run typecheck` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:unit` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run test:e2e` passed. - `pnpm --dir docs-site run report:vector-usage` passed.
